member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Controllers.WebhooksController
member.summary: Handles inbound webhook events from external payment providers.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Controllers.WebhooksController.#ctor(WebhooksAPI.Data.Services.ITransactionService)
member.summary: Handles inbound webhook events from external payment providers.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Controllers.WebhooksController.IngestTransaction(WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.InboundTransactionDto)
member.summary: Ingest a transaction from an external provider.
member.remarks:
**Idempotency:** Keyed on externalRef. Submitting the same ref twice returns 409.
**Pending guard:** If the account already has a pending transaction, the request is rejected with 409 until the first one completes or fails.
**Completed transactions:** The Redis idempotency key is deleted on completion so the slot is freed immediately rather than waiting for the 30-day TTL.
**Sample request:** ```json { "externalRef": "txn_abc123", "accountId": "acc_001", "amount": 250.00, "currency": "USD", "type": "credit", "status": "completed", "transactedAt":"2026-05-25T10:00:00Z" } ```
member.response: Duplicate transaction, or account has a pending transaction in flight.

member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ErrorResponse
member.summary: Standard error envelope returned on 4xx responses.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ErrorResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Standard error envelope returned on 4xx responses.

member.name: P:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.InboundTransactionDto.Metadata
member.summary: Arbitrary provider metadata — serialised to JSON for storage.

member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ProcessResult
member.summary: Discriminated result returned by the service layer. The controller maps each case to the appropriate HTTP response.

member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ProcessResult.Accepted
member.summary: New transaction accepted and stored.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ProcessResult.Accepted.#ctor(WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.TransactionResponse)
member.summary: New transaction accepted and stored.

member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ProcessResult.DuplicateRequest
member.summary: Exact same ExternalRef already exists — true duplicate.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ProcessResult.DuplicateRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Exact same ExternalRef already exists — true duplicate.

member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ProcessResult.PendingTransactionExists
member.summary: Account already has a pending transaction in flight.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.DTO.ProcessResult.PendingTransactionExists.#ctor(System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: Account already has a pending transaction in flight.

member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Data.Models.AccountSummary
member.summary: Derived record: recomputed after every completed transaction for an account. RunningBalance is a computed column — not stored.

member.name: P:WebhooksAPI.Data.Models.Transaction.ExternalRef
member.summary: Unique reference from the external provider — used for idempotency.

member.name: P:WebhooksAPI.Data.Models.Transaction.Currency
member.summary: ISO 4217 currency code, e.g. "USD".

member.name: P:WebhooksAPI.Data.Models.Transaction.Type
member.summary: "credit" or "debit".

member.name: P:WebhooksAPI.Data.Models.Transaction.Status
member.summary: "pending", "completed", or "failed".

member.name: P:WebhooksAPI.Data.Models.Transaction.Metadata
member.summary: Raw JSON blob from the provider — stored as-is.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.Repositories.ITransactionRepository.UpsertAsync(WebhooksAPI.Data.Models.Transaction)
member.summary: Inserts the transaction. If ExternalRef already exists returns the existing row with wasDuplicate = true. Uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for atomicity.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.Repositories.ITransactionRepository.GetPendingTransactionAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the first pending transaction for the account, or null if none exists. Used to block a second transaction while one is still in flight.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.Repositories.ITransactionRepository.RefreshAccountSummaryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Recomputes and upserts the AccountSummary for the given account based on all completed transactions.

member.name: T:WebhooksAPI.Data.Services.IdempotencyService
member.summary:
Redis-backed idempotency gate with status-aware TTLs: - pending → 30 minutes (covers realistic processing windows) - completed → 2 seconds (blocks immediate retries; DB unique constraint handles the rest)
If Redis is unavailable the service degrades gracefully — the PostgreSQL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING upsert acts as the permanent safety net.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.Services.IdempotencyService.#ctor(StackExchange.Redis.IConnectionMultiplexer,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{WebhooksAPI.Data.Services.IdempotencyService})
member.summary:
Redis-backed idempotency gate with status-aware TTLs: - pending → 30 minutes (covers realistic processing windows) - completed → 2 seconds (blocks immediate retries; DB unique constraint handles the rest)
If Redis is unavailable the service degrades gracefully — the PostgreSQL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING upsert acts as the permanent safety net.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.Services.IIdempotencyService.TryAcquireAsync(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Attempts to acquire a lock for the given key with the specified TTL. Returns true if acquired (first time seen), false if the key already exists.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.Services.IIdempotencyService.MarkCompletedAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the key with a very short TTL (2 seconds) to signal completion. The key expires almost immediately, freeing the slot, but any retry within that window is still blocked. After expiry the DB unique constraint on ExternalRef permanently prevents re-use.

member.name: M:WebhooksAPI.Data.Services.IIdempotencyService.ReleaseAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes the key immediately — used when a pending transaction is rejected so the slot is not held unnecessarily.
